3060870.name: Eternal Office
3060870.description:
You attempt to leave an office building late at night but find yourself trapped in office rooms that repeat endlessly.

The office rooms are haunted. As you enter each room, carefully observe for any signs of paranormal activity. If you detect the room is haunted, immediately retreat to the previous room. If not, proceed through the room to the next one. Repeat this successfully eight times to escape the offices.

Note: You will know what paranormal activity is immediately once you see it. There’s no need to memorize mundane details like item locations.

Eternal Office is a paranormal horror walking simulator inspired by the game Exit 8. Eternal Office avoids evoking the feeling of disgust and contains no blood, filth, or gore.
3060870.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
